message:
style(core): remove stale cast_possible_truncation expects after try_from migration

The clippy::cast_possible_truncation expects on write_block_ptr,
ensure_indirect_block, and ensure_pointer_in_block are no longer
needed since all u64→u32 casts now use try_from with explicit errors.
Also removes unnecessary mut on block_dev in compressed cluster writers.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
